name: Tallmadge Lions Park
description: The newly renovated courts at Lions Park include 4 dedicated, permanent pickleball courts. Two additional courts are striped on the tennis court. If no one is playing tennis, pickleball players may bring their own nets and utilize these two additional courts.
open_play_schedule: Courts are open from dawn until dusk daily. Reservations are not accepted and courts are available on a first-come, first-serve basis. When courts are crowded, please allow others to rotate into games.

name: Towpath Tennis Center
description: Towpath Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Akron, OH. There are 24 hard courts. 14 are indoors and 10 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, lights, locker rooms, wheelchair accessibility, and trainers or lessons.
open_play_schedule: The schedule can be flexible.  ALL PICKLEHEAD ROUND ROBIN AND LADDER SESSIONS ARE PRIVATE. Picklehead sessions are usually 4:00-6:00pm on Sundays and 5:30-7:30pm or 7:30-9:30pm on Monday evenings.  Ladder sessions are on Sunday and Tuesday evenings from 6:00-8:30pm

open_play_schedule: The Magic City Pickleball Club plays here MWF mornings.  Visitors 18+ welcome!
